textPlain: Luanti (ex Minetest) also uses this engine btwhttps://www.luanti.org/

Now there's a blast from the past. Irrlichts heyday was around ~2010, but it looks like there's still a few people keeping the lights on.TIL it was used in a commercial game (Bugsnax) relatively recently, although the devs said it will be their final release on the engine.https://xcancel.com/luthyr/status/1271866001467080705
Kind of, they forked Irrlicht and took it in their own direction.https://github.com/luanti-org/luanti/tree/master/irr
Ogre3d also seems to be alive.
